name: Greenfield Academy
description:
Welcome To Greenfield!

You've recently been accepted into a prestigious boarding school for magical girls. Only the most elite of families are allowed to attend. The second you arrive, you meet different species: Humans, vampires, werewolves, aliens, sirens, fairies, witches/warlocks, and so much more! Will you be able to get through school?
creator: SUPERCALAFRAGALISTIC
